description: A1 must write TWO records: PRIVATE full profile to xiigen-business-profiles, GLOBAL 4-field subset to xiigen-matching-profiles. GLOBAL record must not contain questionnaire, goals, challenges, skillGaps, or revenue.
blockConditions: only one storeDocument call made (single record)
sensitive fields (questionnaire, goals, challenges, skillGaps, revenue) present in GLOBAL xiigen-matching-profiles record
GLOBAL record contains more than 4 allowed fields
passConditions: storeDocument called twice: PRIVATE full profile + GLOBAL 4-field subset
xiigen-matching-profiles record contains only: industry_code, business_stage, location_proximity, team_size_tier
resolution: Two storeDocument calls required. PRIVATE full profile + GLOBAL 4 fields only (industry_code, business_stage, location_proximity, team_size_tier). Sensitive fields in GLOBAL = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: A3 @EventPattern must be 'BusinessProfileCreated'. If A3 listens on 'QuestionnaireCompleted', it duplicates A1 input with no data dependency.
blockConditions: A3 (MatchingService) listens on 'QuestionnaireCompleted' event
A3 @EventPattern set to same event as A1 trigger
passConditions: A3 @EventPattern is exactly 'BusinessProfileCreated'
A1 emits BusinessProfileCreated which A3 consumes
resolution: A3 @EventPattern must be 'BusinessProfileCreated'. 'QuestionnaireCompleted' on A3 = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: B1 30-second timeout produces partialResults:true and DataProcessResult.success. Timeout that produces output IS a success mode.
blockConditions: 30-second timeout placed in failureModes
timeout returns DataProcessResult.failure
partial results treated as an error condition
passConditions: timeout with output in quality.successModes only
DataProcessResult.success returned with partialResults:true on timeout
resolution: timeout in quality.successModes only. NOT failureModes. DataProcessResult.failure reserved for infrastructure errors.

description: B1 reads from xiigen-matching-profiles (GLOBAL scope) exclusively. Reading from xiigen-business-profiles is a PRIVATE data leak.
blockConditions: T51 (MatchingService) calls searchDocuments('xiigen-business-profiles', ...)
T51 reads questionnaire answers, goals, challenges from PRIVATE index
passConditions: T51 searchDocuments target is 'xiigen-matching-profiles' only
T51 reads only the 4 GLOBAL match-safe fields
resolution: B1 searchDocuments target must be 'xiigen-matching-profiles'. Any searchDocuments('xiigen-business-profiles', ...) in B1 = PRIVATE data leak = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T52 PersonalizationCompleted broadcast is consent-gated. Private-mode users must receive a completion record but must NOT receive the downstream broadcast.
blockConditions: PersonalizationCompleted enqueued without checking privacy_mode
private-mode user receives PersonalizationCompleted broadcast
consent check absent from T52 before enqueue
passConditions: privacy_mode checked before enqueue('PersonalizationCompleted')
private_mode=true: storeDocument (DNA-8) then SKIP enqueue
public_mode: storeDocument then enqueue
resolution: Check user privacy_mode before queue.enqueue('PersonalizationCompleted'). private_mode=true: storeDocument then SKIP enqueue. Absent consent check = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: PersonalizationCompleted event type must be the string literal 'PersonalizationCompleted' declared as 'as const'. FLOW-01 owns 'OnboardingCompleted'.
blockConditions: event name constructed via template literal or variable
event name computed from config or dynamic source
PersonalizationCompleted confused with OnboardingCompleted (FLOW-01 owns that)
passConditions: const PERSONALIZATION_COMPLETED_EVENT = 'PersonalizationCompleted' as const
event name is a static string literal, never computed
resolution: const PERSONALIZATION_COMPLETED_EVENT = 'PersonalizationCompleted' as const. Any dynamic construction = BUILD_FAILURE.

description: T50 BusinessProfileService: xiigen-business-profiles is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant reads of full profile data are forbidden. The GLOBAL write to xiigen-matching-profiles must contain only the 4 match-safe fields.
blockConditions: full profile (PRIVATE data) written to xiigen-matching-profiles (GLOBAL index)
questionnaire, goals, or challenges fields present in GLOBAL record
tenantId absent from PRIVATE business profile record
passConditions: Matching profile (GLOBAL record) contains only name, industry, and tags — never questionnaire, goals, or challenges
Business profile (PRIVATE record) stored in xiigen-business-profiles with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from ALS
T50 dual-record write: PRIVATE record to xiigen-business-profiles AND GLOBAL record to xiigen-matching-profiles with PRIVATE fields stripped

description: T51 MatchingService: reads from GLOBAL xiigen-matching-profiles. Results stored to PRIVATE xiigen-match-results. Cross-tenant match result reads are forbidden.
blockConditions: match results stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored match result record
T51 reads from xiigen-business-profiles (PRIVATE data leak)
passConditions: Match results stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
T51 reads exclusively from xiigen-matching-profiles (GLOBAL index) — never reads from xiigen-business-profiles (PRIVATE)
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload

description: T52 PersonalizationService: xiigen-personalization-feeds index is PRIVATE scope. Cross-tenant personalization reads are forbidden. PersonalizationCompleted broadcast is consent-gated.
blockConditions: personalization feed stored with knowledgeScope:GLOBAL
tenantId absent from stored personalization record
PersonalizationCompleted enqueued without consent check
passConditions: Personalization feed records stored with knowledgeScope: 'PRIVATE' and tenantId from AsyncLocalStorage
PersonalizationCompleted only enqueued after consent.agreed === true check passes
tenantId sourced exclusively from cls.get().tenantId — never from request parameter or event payload
